subject: FW: AYH CapEx
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, March 05, 2008 8:04 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fw: AYH CapEx

Pls give the attachment to jeffery. It articulates this season's capex for ayh. He shld let me know if he wld like to see us do additional work this season. No one believes that any additional work will enhance revenue at this time. 

----- Original Message -----
From: Garner, Charles
To: Farkas, Andrew L.
Sent: Tue Mar 04 20:52:08 2008
Subject: RE: AYH CapEx

This time … with the attachment.  Sorry.

 

_______________________________

 

Charles H. F. Garner

Island Global Yachting

717 Fifth Avenue - 18th Floor

New York, New York  10022

T:  212.705.5087

F:  212.705.5001

E:  cgarner@igymarinas.com <mailto:cgarner@igymarinas.com> 

________________________________

From: Garner, Charles 
Sent: Tuesday, March 04, 2008 8:51 PM
To: Farkas, Andrew L.
Subject: AYH CapEx

 

Andrew –

 

Attached is a memo describing the recent (and continuing) cap ex improvements at AYH.  I am leaving a hard copy for you in the office for the morning.  Please let me know if you have questions, etc.

 

Thanks.

 

-Charles

 

_______________________________

 

Charles H. F. Garner

Island Global Yachting

717 Fifth Avenue - 18th Floor

New York, New York  10022

T:  212.705.5087

F:  212.705.5001

E:  cgarner@igymarinas.com <mailto:cgarner@igymarinas.com>
--------------------------------------------------------

If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not necessarily represent those of the company.
